general.about:
I'm Niklas Peterson, a father of two, passionate about  design, technology and innovation. Currently shaping experiences as a Senior Product Designer at LottieFiles.\
\
Outside work, you'll find me cherishing quality time with my family. In my free moments, I enjoy exploring design and coding. I've created two iOS apps, [Titls](https://apps.apple.com/app/titls/id1579078964) & [Hydrify](https://apps.apple.com/app/hydrify/id6450311759). These are personal projects that let me scratch that creative itch by seamlessly blending design, development, and tech.

projects.heading: Lummi Figma plugin at Blush Design Inc.
projects.description: Designed the Lummi Figma plugin with a focus on usability, simplicity, and ease of use, while ensuring it consistently reflected the Lummi web experience. Key features of the plugin include quick image insertion, the ability to randomly insert multiple images, and components such as the home feed, categories, filters, and creator profiles.
projects.title: Lummi Figma plugin

projects.heading: Lummi web at Blush Design Inc.
projects.description: Designed and implemented the Lummi design system, ensuring consistency and usability across the product. Contributed to major features of the platform, such as filters, image detail view, and upload flow, among others, with a focus on creating a cohesive and efficient user experience throughout the entire product.
projects.title: Lummi web

projects.heading: Musho at Blush Design Inc.
projects.description: Led the design of the Musho website, incorporating interactive elements and animations to enhance user engagement and overall user experience. Contributed to shaping the brand identity by refining the visual style, color palette, and typography, ensuring a cohesive and recognizable look across all touchpoints. Focused on creating a seamless, visually appealing interface that aligns with the brand’s values and goals.
projects.title: Musho

projects.heading: Musho Figma Plugin at Blush Design Inc.
projects.description: Created various components and views of the Figma plugin. Additionally, designed a concept for the plugin to use a chat-based AI interface instead of an action-based approach.
projects.title: Musho Figma Plugin

projects.heading: Buenoverse at Blush Design Inc.
projects.description: Designed the UI for avatar selection in Buenoverse, creating an intuitive, visually appealing interface for players and explorers. The design prioritizes ease of use and flexibility, enabling seamless avatar customization with advanced tools and dynamic visuals. I ensured smooth navigation, interactive feedback, and a cohesive aesthetic to enhance the user experience and foster creativity.
projects.title: Buenoverse

projects.heading: Bueno Drops Figma Plugin at Blush Design Inc.
projects.description: As the lead designer for the Bueno Drops Figma Plugin, I was responsible for creating an intuitive user experience that allows artists to easily convert their designs in Figma into digital art without the need for coding. I streamlined the user flow, crafted a clean and accessible UI, and optimized the integration with Figma to ensure creators could launch digital collectibles in just a few clicks. My work focused on simplifying the process for both Open and Limited Edition drops, making digital collectibles creation fast and accessible for users of all skill levels.
projects.title: Bueno Drops Figma Plugin

projects.heading: VIP Monkey App at Shine Digital
projects.description: I played a key role in redesigning the VIP Monkey app, an iOS and Android platform for event discovery and ticket management. I improved the app’s aesthetics and user experience, focusing on a sleek and intuitive design. Key updates included enhanced event listings, detailed event pages, and QR-based ticket management for seamless entry.
projects.title: VIP Monkey App

projects.heading: Eurovision (Backstage) App at Shine Digital
projects.description: Designed, coded, and maintained the iOS and Android app for Eurovision (Backstage), used by delegations, crew, and artists from 2016 to 2022.
projects.title: Eurovision (Backstage) App

sideProjects.heading: Hydrify
sideProjects.description: Your personalized iOS hydration app. Crafted from a need for better hydration, it offers intuitive design and customized reminders to ensure you drink enough water. Privacy is paramount with Hydrify; all your data stays on your device. With features like daily goals, flexible reminders, and iOS Health integration, Hydrify is dedicated to enhancing your well-being and hydration habits.
sideProjects.title: Hydrify

sideProjects.heading: Titls
sideProjects.description: A iOS app that lets you create titles and then use widgets to organize your home screens.
sideProjects.title: Titls

sideProjects.heading: iOS Messages  Stickers Template
sideProjects.description:
A template to get started creating your own iOS Messages stickers.

For those interested in coding, I've made an open-source [repository](https://github.com/NiklasPeterson/ios-message-stickers-template) to help you build an iOS Messages Sticker app.
sideProjects.title: iOS Messages  Stickers Template

sideProjects.heading: Timestamps Discord bot
sideProjects.description: A Discord bot that simplifies generating and formatting timestamps for your Discord chats! Timestamps shared via the bot will automatically adjust to each viewer's local timezone, so you don't have to worry about converting times for different regions. Share event details seamlessly and ensure everyone sees the correct local time, hassle-free.
sideProjects.title: Timestamps Discord bot

sideProjects.heading: Timestamps
sideProjects.description: A web app that helps you generate and format timestamps for sharing on platforms like Discord. With these timestamps, viewers will always see the date and time in their own local timezone, eliminating the need to provide different timezones to your audience.
sideProjects.title: Timestamps

features.heading: Digest #103 on Read.cv
features.description: "Built from scratch, [Niklas Peterson’s new site](https://niklaspeterson.com/) really does bring digital products to life through pixels and code."
features.title: Digest #103

workExperience.heading: Product Designer at Blush Design Inc.
workExperience.description: I played a pivotal role in designing key products, including [Bueno](https://Bueno.art), [Musho](https://musho.ai), and [Lummi](https://lummi.ai). My responsibilities included wireframing, creating high-fidelity designs, and ensuring seamless handoffs to developers. I played a key role in enhancing our Figma-based design system, which improved consistency across all components. Additionally, I assembled interactive prototypes and strategically planned user flows, balancing aesthetic appeal with functional goals. My efforts not only enhanced user experience but also streamlined the design process, contributing to successful product launches.
workExperience.title: Product Designer

workExperience.heading: Designer Engineer at Shine Digital
workExperience.description: My focus area were designing our CMS, websites, and mobile apps for our clients. Besides designing, I also did a lot of frontend coding, including coding websites & apps using React.js & React-Native and further developing our CMS.
workExperience.title: Designer Engineer

workExperience.heading: Project Manager (Part time) at Shine Digital
workExperience.description:
* Planning and managing projects through sprint setup and ticket management.

* Leading the development team to ensure timely, efficient execution.

* Overseeing product development, with a strong focus on budgeting, time management, and strategic planning.

* Regularly communicating with customers to address needs, feature requests, and feedback.
workExperience.title: Project Manager (Part time)
